ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the project */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES project_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES project_creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the project creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project creator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the project creator (e.g., project manager, team leader, site engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated number of hours required for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES task_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., pdf, word, excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES project_documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, team leader, site engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the assignment (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given with the comment (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_ratings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that depends on another task */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that is depended on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
